prior_learnings.note: inviteByNpub commits members immediately on invite, not on accept — the pending-in-tree window is real
Chakra Modal drops data-testid; put testid on inner Button; assert dialog via button visibility
gate e2e on rendered readiness markers not fixed timeouts
invite picker disabled-option behavior in Chromium
MemberProfile.pubkeyHex is already keyed to the signed author (payloadToMemberProfile) — use it for marker-clear identity

marker_store_template.notes: createStore('few-...','...'); key = `${groupId}:${pubkey}`; API: load(get-or-null), save(set), per-key del, per-group prefix-delete via entries()+filter+del, '*' sentinel for full clear(). New: app/src/lib/marmot/pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts (createStore('few-pending-invite-markers','markers')).

direct_invite_call_sites.fn: submitInvite (:66-76) called by handleInvite (:184-209) at :192; pure fn taking inviteByNpub; write marker before, clear on !result.ok
handleAddToGroup (:550-564) calls inviteByNpub directly at :554; write marker before, clear in the else branch

approve_path.fn: approveJoinRequestImpl (:492-574) calls inviteByNpub directly at :515; provisional seed at :538 only if request.nickname; MUST NOT write marker (structurally excluded by insertion-point choice)

confirmed_pending_derivation.confirmed_set: app/pages/groups.tsx :298-343 effect; `if(!p.provisional) confirmed.add(pubkey)` at :311; own pubkey always added :329; stored in confirmedPubkeys state :150; passed to MemberList :568
confirmed_pending_derivation.marker_set_wiring: load pendingInviteMarkers Set once in the groups.tsx :298-343 effect (async context method getPendingDirectInvites(groupId)); thread as new MemberList prop; select label at MemberList.tsx:100/303 — NO per-row async call

member_list_ui.row_testids: member-item-${prefix}, member-name-${prefix}, member-pending-${prefix}, make-admin-${prefix}, cancel-invite-${prefix} (:306), cancel-invite-confirm-${prefix} (:340); prefix=pubkey.slice(0,8). NO remove-member-${prefix} yet — add it.
member_list_ui.admin_gate: onCancelInvite passed from groups.tsx:569 already admin-gated (isAdmin ? onCancelInvite : undefined); onRemoveMember follows same prop-undefined gating
member_list_ui.new_affordance: second button adjacent to :303-310, shown for every other in-tree not-self admin row; own useDisclosure confirm modal mirroring :323-346 with removeMember* copy; remove-member-confirm-${prefix} testid on inner Button

removal_path.shared_helper: app/src/lib/marmot/cancelInvitationImpl.ts cancelPendingInvitationImpl (:50-126) is ALREADY label-agnostic (takes groupId, pubkey, optional sendAnnouncement). Both onCancelInvite and new onRemoveMember call the SAME MarmotContext.cancelPendingInvitation wrapper (:1872-1906), differing only in toast copy keys.
removal_path.race_paths: two raceDetected short-circuits return {ok:true,raceDetected:true} WITHOUT commit: :56-63 (already not pending) and :80-83 (leaf indexes empty). Purge+marker-clear must run on these too.
removal_path.purge_and_clear_attach: in the groups.tsx caller (onCancelInvite/onRemoveMember) AFTER cancelPendingInvitation resolves, gated on post-hoc 'pubkey no longer in group.memberPubkeys' — NOT inside cancelInvitationImpl (IDB-decoupled).

member_profile_purge.gap: only whole-group clearMemberProfiles(groupId) exists (groupStorage.ts:104-106; single array under key group:${groupId}). NO per-member delete.
member_profile_purge.new_fn: app/src/lib/marmot/groupStorage.ts deleteMemberProfile(groupId, pubkey): load, filter by pubkeyHex (case-insensitive), save if changed — mirrors mergeMemberProfile read-filter-rewrite (:79-102)

profile_merge_hook.author_field: :33 authorPubkey = profilePayload.signedEvent?.pubkey ?? rumor.pubkey; also memberProfile.pubkeyHex already keyed to signed author (profileSync.ts:164-185 payloadToMemberProfile)
profile_merge_hook.marker_clear: attach after :38, gated on profilePayload.signedEvent present AND author == pubkey; INDEPENDENT of merged boolean (arrival is the fact). New dep clearPendingDirectInvite added to ProfileHandlerDeps (:19-25), threaded through registerHandlers.ts:18-65,93-99. Single handler — no dual-listener (consolidated).

context_method_pattern.sites: adding a context method touches 4 places in MarmotContext.tsx: (1) type in MarmotContextValue :245-359; (2) useCallback boundary (dynamic import pure impl); (3) value useMemo object :2100-2138 AND its dep array :2139-2176; (4) DEFAULT_MARMOT fallback :2187-2225

leave_cleanup.per_group: leaveGroupImpl.ts:25-50 Deps lists every per-group clear* (clearMemberProfiles, clearPendingJoinRequestsForGroup, clearInviteLinksForGroup...) from MarmotContext.tsx:1710-1743; add clearPendingDirectInvitesForGroup here
leave_cleanup.account_reset: clearAllGroupData groupStorage.ts:112-118; add marker '*' full-clear here too (dual-cleanup precedent)

i18n.pattern: Copy type groups section ~:196-203; en ~:852-859; de ~:1409-1416. cancelInvite{Button,Title,Body,Confirm,Success,Error,RaceNotice,AnnouncementWarning}. Add removeMember* mirrors in all 3 locations. makeAdmin{Button,Title,Body,Confirm} is the sibling precedent for a second admin confirm-dialog action.

testing.unit: vitest app/tests/unit/, node env, no jsdom/@testing-library; makeDeps() factory + injected mocked callables; template tests: cancelInvitationImpl.test.ts (race paths, extraProposals shape), approveJoinRequestImpl.test.ts (best-effort throw + console.warn spy — template for marker-write-failure), groupStorage.test.ts (idb-keyval Map mock + idbSetSpy net-write assertions)
testing.e2e_bucket: groups-*.spec.ts = relay bucket (Docker strfry). test.describe.serial, two browser.newContext per peer, publish THROUGH THE APP. auth-helpers.ts USER_A/B/C salted per file.

e2e_templates.profile_page_invite: NO existing e2e precedent for profile.tsx handleAddToGroup direct invite — scenario 3 authors fresh (navigate /profile?pubkey=... drive that button)
e2e_templates.remove_member: no template (affordance new); nearest groups-admin.spec.ts (readiness-marker gating)

testing.make_targets: make test-e2e-all (60-test gate) = test-e2e-fast + test-e2e; make test-e2e-groups (dev subset, NOT the gate); single spec: E2E_GROUPS=1 node scripts/run-e2e.mjs tests/e2e/groups-<name>.spec.ts (needs e2e-up); run playwright test --list after collection edits
